data.content:
This is an **xUnit v3** project using **Microsoft.Testing.Platform** (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). Use the `--filter` flag with the fully qualified class name:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Contoso.Cart.Tests.ShoppingCartTests"
```

Or more concisely, filter by class name:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~ShoppingCartTests"
```

Both will run only tests in `ShoppingCartTests`, skipping `InventoryServiceTests`.
